executives.name: Paul Rollinson
executives.background: Mr. Rollinson was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer on August 1, 2012. He joined Kinross as Executive Vice-President, New Projects in September 2008 and was appointed Executive Vice-President, Corporate Development in September 2009. Prior to joining Kinross, Mr. Rollinson was at Deutsche Bank AG where he was most recently Deputy Head of Investment Banking (Canada) and Head of the Americas Metals and Mining Group. He has over 20 years of investment banking experience.
